description: Composition V-neck full-sleeve pullover with broad blue and green stripes, made of a blend of acrylic and wool, has ribbing around the neck, cuffs and hemline, and "scullers Association" logo in flock appliquéd on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Welcome the winter in style in this pullover from Scullers. Stylish to the hilt and snug on the body, this pullover is a great addition to your wardrobe. Pair it with denims and suede shoes to look like the king of casual winter wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in pullovers Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
